actual_end_help: Set only when the phase is fully complete — it locks in the final variance.
actual_minus_plan_helper: Actual profit minus planned profit baseline.
actual_profit_explain: uses current project progress. For S-rank projects, progress is weighted from Task Assign and Tracking rows; otherwise it falls back to approved hours against budget hours.
actual_profit_minus_planned_profit_basel: Actual profit minus planned profit baseline.
actual_start_help: Set the first day you actually started this phase.
add_a_new_employee_to_the_roster_cost_pe: Add a new employee to the roster. Cost per hour will be automatically calculated.
add_one_time_expenses_specific_to_this_c: Add one-time expenses specific to this contract (travel, audits, specialized licenses).
add_team_member_description: Assign an active employee to this project with an hour allocation.
add_team_members_before_assigning: Add team members before assigning tasks
aggregate_claude_api_usage_across_the_pl: Aggregate Claude API usage across the platform.
aggregate_claude_subtitle: Aggregate Claude API usage across the platform.
ai_assigned_summary: AI assigned {count, plural, one {# task} other {# tasks}} across {phaseCount, plural, one {# phase} other {# phases}} from the project's Estimate file.
ai_assistant_build_title: Step 1 of 3 — propose the role mix (qty, salary range, cost) from this deal’s budget and timeline.
ai_assistant_desc: Ask the chatbot anything about CRM, estimation, contracts, or time tracking. It answers from your platform documentation.
ai_assistant_notes_title: Step 3 of 3 — paste meeting minutes or chat. AI proposes scope and overhead changes for review.
ai_assistant_scope_title: Step 2 of 3 — generate scope rows and overheads from the deal context using Claude.
ai_auto_assign_desc: When a deal is won, AI automatically distributes workload hours across the project team based on roles and availability.
ai_could_not_save: AI ran but could not save to the deal — try again.
ai_contract_draft_cta: See it in Project Pipeline → Draft
ai_contract_draft_desc: After estimation, AI drafts the 10 contract sections in plain English — fees, scope, OT terms, all filled from the deal context.
ai_estimated_workload: AI estimated workload at {hours} hours total, distributed across the roles below.
ai_forecast_cta: See it on the Forecast page
ai_forecast_desc: AI surfaces bleeding projects, stalled deals, and overloaded people — every alert names a specific entity with a concrete number.
ai_generated_features: AI generated {count} features{ovhSuffix} — saved to deal.
ai_project_planner_desc: Build the role mix and generate the project scope from the deal context.
ai_section_heading: Five AI features that change how agencies work.
ai_section_subtitle: Every recommendation is grounded in your real employee data, project scope, and financial history.
ai_task_assignment_description: AI Task Assignment — preview the AI's proposed team additions, confirm, then schedule tasks.
ai_team_builder_desc: Paste a project brief and the AI suggests the optimal team composition — matching skills, capacity, and budget in seconds.
ai_usage_costs_subtitle: Platform-wide AI consumption and estimated costs.
all_active_already_on_team: All active employees are already on this team
all_active_employees_are_already_on_this: All active employees are already on this team.
all_active_on_team_short: All active employees are already on this team.
all_invoices_issued_against_this_contrac: All invoices issued against this contract.
allocated_hours_helper: Hours budgeted for this person on this project. Drives the utilization bar.
allocation_explainer: Allocated hours per member are distributed from the xlsx grand total, weighted by rank (Lead > Senior > Mid > Junior). Sum should match the project total ±rounding.
allocations_refreshed: Allocations refreshed from the latest xlsx.
already_fully_staffed: Planned team structure is already fully staffed.
anka_assistant_subtitle: Ask about CRM, estimation, contracts, projects, time tracking, and organization.
answer_template_desc: Anything you skip will become a {todo} in the generated draft for you to fill manually. The deal's Requirement Description and Estimation handoff fields are passed automatically.
any_clarifications_from_the_customer_con: Any clarifications from the customer conversation. The AI uses this when drafting the OT clause.
anything_the_contract_wizard_should_know: Anything the contract wizard should know about overtime billing
anything_worth_flagging_blockers_scope_c: Anything worth flagging — blockers, scope changes, surprises…
anything_you_skip_will_become_a: Anything you skip will become a
appears_as_the_provider_on_every_contrac: Appears as the Provider on every contract PDF and in the email subject/body the customer receives.
applied_changes_saved: Applied changes — saved as v{version} with notes attached.
applied_to_operating_profit_on_the_finan: Applied to operating profit on the Financials page to compute net profit.
archive_contract_confirm: Are you sure you want to archive this contract? This action cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_you_want_to_archive_this_co: Are you sure you want to archive this contract? This action cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_you_want_to_deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate
are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete: Are you sure you want to delete
are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete_this_dea: Are you sure you want to delete this deal? This action cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete_this_inv: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice? This action cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete_this_mil: Are you sure you want to delete this milestone? This action cannot be undone.
ask_about_crm_estimation_contracts_proje: Ask about CRM, estimation, contracts, projects, time tracking, and organization.
ask_the_ai_for_a_different_team_kept_mem: Ask the AI for a different team — kept members stay.
asking_ai_to_fit_team: Asking the AI to fit the team…
asking_the_ai_to_fit_the_team: Asking the AI to fit the team…
assign_an_active_employee_to_this_projec: Assign an active employee to this project with an hour allocation.
assign_tasks_only_description: Assign Tasks Only — skip team build and schedule tasks against the project's current team.
attention_description: Projects where actual profit or progress is trailing plan.
audit_logs_subtitle: Track all administrative actions, user activity, and system errors.
auth_hero_subtitle: Predict margins early, compare scenarios fast, and act on concrete suggestions before project kickoff.
auto_created_when_this_deal_was_won: Auto-created when this deal was won
auto_created_when_won: Auto-created when this deal was won
auto_save_explainer: Edits auto-save to the deal as you type. Save Version creates a checkpoint with XLSX.
baseline_based_on_planned_project_runnin: Baseline based on planned project running time.
baseline_based_on_planned_time: Baseline based on planned project running time.
billing_plans_subtitle: Manage tenant subscription plans and billing status.
breakdown_of_revenue_versus_costs_by_mon: Breakdown of revenue versus costs by month.
browsers_os_versions_device_classes_cove: Browsers, OS versions, device classes covered. Drives QA hours in Estimation.
budget_overage_explain: {over} over the client's {budget} budget ({pct}%). Lower the target margin or reduce scope before quoting.
build_the_role_mix_and_generate_the_proj: Build the role mix and generate the project scope from the deal context.
change_password_description: Update your password. You will need to log in again after changing it.
changes_apply_immediately_across_the_pla: Changes apply immediately across the platform.
chart_caption: The graph shows only monthly cost and profit. Initial budget comparison is shown separately below using the cumulative target for {month}.
chatbot_examples: Examples: "How do I win a deal?", "How does estimation work?", "How does auto-assign work?"
choose_the_ses_variant_that_best_matches: Choose the SES variant that best matches this deal. The Estimation menu can hint at one via
click_generate_summary: Click Generate Summary to get AI suggestions for closing the target gap or reaching the year-end initial budget goal.
clock_time_you_actually_spent_today: Clock time you actually spent today.
code_lowercase_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
company_logo_desc: Rendered at the top of every contract PDF. PNG, JPG, or WebP up to 2 MB. Recommended size: ~400 px wide.
company_logo_hint: The next contract you generate will use the new logo. Existing PDFs aren't re-rendered.
company_name_desc: Appears as the Provider on every contract PDF and in the email subject/body the customer receives.
company_profit_snapshot_subtitle: Compare current overall project profit against the planned baseline.
company_settings_description: Your company name and logo appear at the top of every contract PDF and in the customer-facing email subject + body.
compare_current_overall_project_profit_a: Compare current overall project profit against the planned baseline.
consumed_with_note: Consumed: {hours}h · increasing the budget moves the over-budget threshold.
continue_to_workspace: Continue to your gross-profit insights workspace.
continue_to_your_gross_profit_insights_w: Continue to your gross-profit insights workspace.
contract_draft_subnote: Time logged against this project may not be invoiceable until the contract is signed.
contract_not_signed_warning: Contract not yet signed — time logged here may not be invoiceable
contract_not_yet_signed_time_logged_here: Contract not yet signed — time logged here may not be invoiceable
contract_ready_desc: Capture the terms the customer agreed to. Submitting this advances the deal from Rank B → A and locks these fields for contract drafting.
contracts_subtitle_disabled: Manage active contracts from won deals. Milestones and invoices ship in the next phase.
contracts_subtitle_enabled: Manage active contracts, milestones, and client invoices.
correct_invoice_details_before_payment_l: Correct invoice details before payment. Locked once fully Paid or Cancelled.
cost_to_bill_hint: (0–1; e.g. 0.40 = cost is 40% of billable rate)
could_not_load_contracts: Could not load contracts or invoices.
could_not_load_contracts_or_invoices: Could not load contracts or invoices.
could_not_load_that_version_apos_s_detai: Could not load that version's details.
could_not_load_version: Could not load that version's details.
could_not_save_changes: Could not save changes — your edits are still in the UI but not on the deal.
could_not_save_roles: Could not save the roles — please try again.
couldn_apos_t_load_this_contract_draft_i: Couldn't load this contract draft. It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
create_a_billing_milestone_for_a_contrac: Create a billing milestone for a contract.
create_a_custom_seniority_rank_higher_le: Create a custom seniority rank. Higher level = more senior.
create_a_free_anka_account_to_get_starte: Create a free ANKA account to get started.
create_a_new_department_for_your_organiz: Create a new department for your organization.
create_a_skill_to_assign_to_employees: Create a skill to assign to employees.
create_and_manage_all_organizations_on_t: Create and manage all organizations on the platform.
create_free_account: Create a free ANKA account to get started.
create_invoice_dialog_desc: Issue an invoice against an active contract.
create_new_department_description: Create a new department for your organization.
create_rank_description: Create a custom seniority rank. Higher level = more senior.
create_skill_description: Create a skill to assign to employees.
cta_heading: See ANKA in action with your own data.
cta_subtitle: Log in with the demo account to explore a fully seeded agency workspace — deals, projects, time entries, invoices, and AI features ready to go.
current_project_profit_annual_initial_bu: Current project profit, annual initial budget target, and delivery health in one place.
customer_provides_help: Devices, environments, credentials the customer must supply for us to deliver.
customer_provides_placeholder: e.g. AWS account access, staging environment, test devices, SSO accounts for our engineers...
customer_requirements_desc: Optional — fill in as customer conversations surface details. Estimation reads these when pricing; the AI uses them when drafting the contract. Locked once contract drafting starts.
customer_signer_note: Captured during negotiation. The deal contact ({contact}) is the day-to-day liaison and is often not the authorised signer. Leave a field blank to print a blank line on the PDF for the customer to fill in by hand. The signing date is always left blank — we don't know when they'll sign.
dashboard_description: Current project profit, annual initial budget target, and delivery health in one place.
deal_locked_drafting: Contract drafting has started — the deal's scope, timeline, and budget are now locked. To change scope, drop this deal and start a new one.
deal_locked_won: This deal is signed and locked. Amendments require a new deal.
deal_moved_to_won: Deal moved to S — Won; contract record created.
deal_profile_desc: Required fields drive the AI contract drafting wizard later. The Estimation menu reads these values when calculating cost and team structure.
define_organization_wide_fixed_monthly_o: Define organization-wide fixed monthly overhead costs.
define_roles_and_rates: Define roles and standard billable rates.
define_roles_and_standard_billable_rates: Define roles and standard billable rates.
delete_deal_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this deal? This action cannot be undone.
delete_log_confirm: Delete the {date} log ({progress}h progress / {used}h used)? This cannot be undone.
delivery_lag_help: Forecast: months between a deal closing and revenue landing.
demo_login_failed: Demo login failed. Ensure seeders are run.
demo_mode_banner: Demo mode shows sample project-profit and budget signals so you can inspect the dashboard shape without live tenant data.
devices_environments_credentials_the_cus: Devices, environments, credentials the customer must supply for us to deliver.
direct_labor_desc: Full payroll for active and on-leave employees across months with activity.
draft_already_sent: This draft has already been sent.
draft_sent_warning: Any edits you make here won't reach the customer until you re-send from the next step. The PDF re-renders automatically on re-send so the customer gets the updated content.
drop_deal_confirm: Dropped deals can't be reactivated — to reconsider this opportunity, create a new deal.
drop_reason_placeholder: e.g. Lost to competitor on price, project cancelled, budget frozen
dropped_deals_can_apos_t_be_reactivated_: Dropped deals can't be reactivated — to reconsider this opportunity, create a new deal.
edit_deal_subtitle: Update the customer intake. Estimation owns the cost calculation; this menu owns negotiation and contract drafting.
edit_project_details_description: Kickoff scheduling, PM assignment, and budget tuning.
edits_auto_save_to_the_deal_as_you_type_: Edits auto-save to the deal as you type. Save Version creates a checkpoint with XLSX.
email_draft_desc: Email the draft to your contact. Preview the PDF first to sanity-check what they'll receive.
email_the_draft_to_your_contact_preview_: Email the draft to your contact. Preview the PDF first to sanity-check what they'll receive.
employee_form_description: Add a new employee to the roster. Cost per hour will be automatically calculated.
estimate_versions_desc: Track saved estimates, compare versions, and export to XLSX.
estimation_defaults_description: Fallback assumptions used by the Estimation Engine when a deal or role doesn't supply concrete data.
estimation_engine_description: Simulate margins and calculate project costs with precision. Select a deal from the CRM pipeline to load its data, or build an estimate from scratch.
every_recommendation_is_grounded_in_your: Every recommendation is grounded in your real employee data, project scope, and financial history.
exchange_rates_desc: Set exchange rates against USD for accurate AI budget calculations.
exchange_rates_note: The AI Team Builder converts all budgets and costs to USD before analysis. Default: 1 USD = 4,500 MMK, 1 USD = 158 JPY.
failed_to_load_ai_usage: Failed to load AI usage data.
fallback_hourly_hint: (used when no employee or role rate is available)
fields_required_full: Fields marked * are required. Everything else can be filled in later.
financial_subtitle: Project profit tracking, company overall profit, and monthly P&L in one place.
footer_tagline: All-in-one agency management: pipeline, estimation, contracts, projects, time tracking, and financials — with AI that works.
forecast_no_alerts: No notable issues right now — pipeline is healthy.
forecast_budget_vs_target_desc: Initial Budget is annual, so this comparison uses the amount that should be reached by {month}.
forecast_budget_vs_target_title: Forecast Profit vs Declared Budget Target
forecast_chart_desc: Income and cost share the left scale. Net profit uses its own right-side scale so positive months stay above zero and loss months drop below zero.
forecast_chart_title: Income, Cost and Profit (Full Fiscal Year - Jan to Dec)
forecast_critical: Critical: At least one forecast month goes into loss.
forecast_description: Profit condition is calculated month by month, then compared against the annual Initial Budget target prorated to the 6th forecast month.
forecast_generate_hint: Click Generate Summary to get AI suggestions for improving the current-month-to-year-end forecast and reaching the year-end initial budget goal.
forecast_helper_ahead: Forecast profit is already above the {month} target.
forecast_helper_behind: More profit needed to reach the {month} target.
forecast_helper_on: Forecast profit is exactly on the {month} target.
forecast_monthly_desc: Monthly breakdown for the full fiscal year, Jan through Dec.
forecast_no_budget_desc: Declare an Initial Budget for {year} on the Company Settings page (Organization to Company) to enable budget-vs-actual comparison for this forecast.
forecast_no_income_desc: Company cost still appears every month because payroll and overhead continue even when no selected project income is active.
forecast_no_income_title: No forecast income sources in this scope
forecast_page_desc: Profit condition is calculated month by month from the current month through year end, then compared against the annual Initial Budget target that should be reached by {month}.
forecast_scope_card_desc: Cost uses all Active and On Leave employee payroll plus matching monthly overheads. Income comes from the selected project ranks.
forecast_scope_description: Annual Initial Budget is stored in company settings and compared against the cumulative target for the 6th forecast month.
forecast_vs_target_metric: 6-Month Forecast Profit vs {month} Initial Budget Target
forecast_vs_target_row: {window} Forecast Profit vs {month} Initial Budget Target
forecast_warning: Warning: Profit remains positive but margin is thin.
global_overhead_desc: Organization overheads that match each month plus always-on costs.
hero_subtitle: ANKA unites CRM, project estimation, contract billing, time tracking, and financial forecasting into one intelligent platform — powered by AI that builds teams, assigns work, and answers your questions.
how_heading: From first contact to final invoice, in one system.
included_hours_help: Hours absorbed before customer-pays kicks in (Yazaki uses 12).
income_tax_help: Applied to operating profit on the Financials page to compute net profit.
initial_annual_budget_desc: This is the company's full-year target budget. Forecast uses this saved amount for all annual and prorated budget comparisons.
initial_budget_annual_caption: Initial Budget is annual, so this comparison uses the amount that should be reached by {month}.
late_hours_subtitle: Daily inefficiency surfaced from My Schedule progress logs. Hours spent beyond delivered work, multiplied by each member's cost per hour.
leave_blank_tenant_default: Leave blank to use the tenant default. The contract date is auto-set to today when the PDF is generated.
linked_contract_draft_warning: Linked contract is still in Draft status.
login_credentials_create_hint: The employee will use these to sign in and view their assigned tasks.
login_credentials_edit_hint: Update the employee's sign-in details. Leave the password blank to keep the current one.
login_credentials_no_login_hint: This employee has no login yet. Set both an email and a password to create one.
manage_roster_and_costs: Manage your organization's roster and costs.
manage_skills_description: Manage skills that can be assigned to employees.
mark_contract_ready_hint: Press this when the customer has agreed. Locks the terms and advances the deal to Rank A.
mark_contract_signed_desc: Records the date both parties countersigned. After this you can activate the contract.
master_assign_desc: Per-phase owners from Estimate.xlsx (Web_Manhour_Detail). Click any 担当者, date, or ステータス cell to edit.
module_contracts_desc: Milestone-based contracts with invoice tracking. Revenue recognition updates automatically when invoices are paid.
module_delivery_desc: Track budget hours, consumed hours, and burn rate. See which projects are on track, at risk, or over budget.
module_estimation_desc: Calculate labor, overhead, buffer, and margin in real time. AI suggests the right team before you commit.
module_financials_desc: Real-time P&L from paid invoices and approved time entries. Reconciles cleanly with the Forecast page for past months.
module_forecast_desc: Past months show real cash collected; future months project pipeline-weighted income. AI Forecast Summary names bleeding projects, stalled deals, and overloaded people.
module_pipeline_desc: Move deals through C → B → A → S with event-driven rank transitions. AI drafts contracts from your Estimation handoff and locks terms once drafting starts.
module_time_desc: Log, submit, and approve time entries. Approved hours feed directly into project burn and P&L calculations.
monthly_breakdown_desc: Monthly breakdown from current month to next 6 months.
monthly_pnl_logic_desc: These monthly lines are still computed live from invoices, time tracking, and organization overheads.
monthly_pnl_statement_desc: Breakdown of revenue versus costs by month.
move_deal_to_qualified_hint: Move the deal to Qualified (Rank B) before marking contract ready.
my_schedule_card_desc: Phases assigned to you across this project. Click the pencil icon on any of your phases to log today's progress.
my_schedule_description_part1: Per-phase plan for this project. Phases assigned to you have a pencil icon — click it to log today's
n_skills_selected: {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} selected
name: Name
net_margin_desc: Operating profit after tenant tax rate ({rate}%).
new_deal_subtitle: Capture the customer's intake. Estimation calculates the cost; this menu owns negotiation and contract drafting.
no_active_contracts_found: No active contracts found. Win a deal in the CRM to auto-generate a contract.
no_active_projects_to_assign: No active projects. Win a deal to create a project.
no_active_projects_yet: No active projects yet. Win deals in the CRM to launch projects.
no_ai_calls_logged: No AI calls logged yet. Use the AI Team Builder on a deal to generate the first entry.
no_ai_usage_any_tenant: No AI usage recorded across any tenant yet.
no_attention_projects: No projects are currently flagged for attention.
no_audit_logs_match: No audit logs match your filters.
no_deals_match_filters: No deals match the current filters.
no_deals_yet: No deals yet. Create your first deal to start the pipeline.
no_employee_linked_warning: Your user account isn't linked to an employee record yet, so there's no schedule to load. Ask an administrator to link your account.
no_estimation_yet: No estimation built yet. Open Estimation Engine to build one.
no_financial_data_pnl: No financial data. Add invoices and time entries to generate P&L statements.
no_financial_data_yet: No financial data yet. Add invoices and approved time entries.
no_forecast_sources_desc: This scope needs at least one active S, A, or B rank deal with contract value or estimated cost data.
no_ghost_roles: No ghost roles defined. Edit the deal to add staffing estimates.
no_late_hours_logs: No daily progress logs yet. Once members log progress vs. used hours on My Schedule, their late hours will surface here.
no_phases_match_filters: No phases match the current filters.
no_prior_entries: No prior entries — this will be the first log for this phase.
no_project_profit_data: No project profit data yet. Signed projects with time tracking will appear here.
no_roles_defined: No roles defined for your tenant — add at least one role before generating an AI draft.
no_skills_exist: No skills exist yet. Create some on the Skills tab first.
no_task_assignments: No task assignments yet. Click AI Task Assignment on a project above to generate them from Estimate.xlsx.
no_time_entries_yet: No time entries logged on this project yet.
note_placeholder: Anything worth flagging — blockers, scope changes, surprises…
nothing_assigned_to_you: Nothing is assigned to you in this project yet.
oos_help: How additional / out-of-scope work is handled. Leave blank to use the contract template default.
oos_placeholder: e.g. Out-of-scope work billed at OT rate; requires written change order from authorised signatory...
organization_settings_description: Manage your departments, roles, employees, and cost structures.
ot_absorbed_warning: Absorbing OT means every overtime hour an engineer logs comes out of this deal's profit. Make sure the budget covers expected overrun before agreeing to this with the customer.
ot_notes_placeholder: Any clarifications from the customer conversation. The AI uses this when drafting the OT clause.
ot_policy_desc: How is overtime handled? This drives ⑦ Profit Calculate (absorbed OT reduces project profit) and gets printed in the contract draft.
ot_policy_placeholder: Anything the contract wizard should know about overtime billing
ot_rate_help: What the customer pays for each OT hour.
overhead_categories_description: Define organization-wide fixed monthly overhead costs.
overtime_impact_explain: is only shown as a negative when the contract does not have an OT fee recovery path. If OT fees exist, the impact line stays neutral and any recoverable OT revenue is added back into actual profit.
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
payment_delay_help: Fallback when a client has no paid-invoice history. Per-client averages override this.
personal_info_description: Changes apply immediately across the platform.
pick_auto_fills: Picking auto-fills the fields below. Leave the fields blank to use the tenant default.
pick_project_to_see_phases: Pick a project to see your phases.
pick_template_desc: Choose the SES variant that best matches this deal. The Estimation menu can hint at one via suggested_template_variant.
placeholder_skill_examples: e.g. React, Financial Modeling, Legal Review
plan_profit_explain: comes from the project's planned revenue and estimated cost, then the dashboard scales it by the planned running timeline to get the expected profit by today.
platform_dashboard_subtitle: Overview of all tenants, users, and platform activity.
please_enter_valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
please_fill_required_fields: Please fill in {count} required fields before saving.
please_fix_highlighted: Please fix the highlighted field before saving.
please_fix_highlighted_n: Please fix {count} highlighted {count, plural, one {field} other {fields}} before saving.
please_fix_highlighted_plural: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
prefilled_estimate_note: Pre-filled from the current estimate — adjust to match what the customer actually agreed to.
preview_ai_team_tooltip: Preview AI team build, then assign tasks
profile_description: Update your name and email address.
profit_logic_desc: Project profit now reads from delivery progress, actual running time, and OT policy.
progress_hours_help: How much of the planned work you completed today.
project_delivery_description: Track active project status, consumed hours, and budget burn rate.
project_overhead_desc: Add one-time expenses specific to this contract (travel, audits, specialized licenses).
project_pipeline_description: Manage leads, draft contracts with AI, and track opportunities through to signed.
project_profit_comparison_subtitle: See which projects are following plan and which ones are moving into risk.
project_roles_desc: The role mix saved on this deal. Generated by AI Team Builder above, or set manually on the deal page.
project_scope_desc: Itemize the project scope to calculate base developer costs.
projects_behind_plan: Projects behind plan on margin, pace, or both.
rank_status_explain: Deal is at Rank {rank}. The agreed terms are locked; you can still save more versions for the record.
ranks_description: Seniority tiers used by the AI Team Builder. Defaults: Junior, Mid, Senior, Lead. Add custom ranks for your team (e.g. Principal, Staff Engineer).
realized_profit_description: Profit from delivery projects based on actual running progress and overtime policy.
recognized_revenue_desc: Sum of paid invoices, grouped by paid date.
regenerate_team_tooltip: Ask the AI for a different team — kept members stay.
register_subtitle: Start with ANKA to forecast project margins, compare financial scenarios, and unlock practical profit suggestions.
remove_member_confirm_suffix: from the team? Time entries they already logged stay on the project — only the allocation is dropped.
replace_estimate_explain: A fresh AI suggestion will replace the {rowCount} scope row(s){withOverheads} currently on this deal, and save the new version to the database.
requirement_placeholder: What does the customer need? Tech stack, scope, deliverables, integrations, special working-hours requirements, testing scope...
resolve_todo_warning: Resolve the {todo} markers (or supply more wizard answers and regenerate) before sending to the customer.
schedule_tracking_description: Per-phase progress vs plan across the whole project. Click a row for the day-by-day log history.
search_by_deal_or_client: Search by deal name or client...
select_deal_from_crm: Select a deal from CRM to estimate...
select_project_for_assign_table: Select a project to view its master assign table.
select_project_to_view_tasks: Select a project to view its task assignments
seniority_level_hint: Higher = more senior. Defaults: Junior 10, Mid 20, Senior 30, Lead 40. Use gaps (e.g. 35 for Principal) so future ranks can fit between.
set_budget_timeline_hint: Set Budget and Timeline on the deal to enable role-mix suggestions. The AI will estimate workload hours from the project description.
short_identifier_hint: Short identifier. Letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen only.
show_dropped_tooltip: Overlay dropped deals on the board
sign_up_failed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
signatories_desc: The two people who will sign this contract. Provider side pre-fills from the tenant default; Customer side is captured at negotiation (different from the day-to-day deal contact).
signatory_desc: Appears in the Provider signature block of every contract PDF. Set the person who actually signs on behalf of the company; salespeople can override on a per-contract basis during the draft wizard.
signatory_helper: Eligible employees: Manager rank or above. Picking auto-fills the fields below; manual edits still work.
skip_team_build_tooltip: Skip team build and schedule tasks against the current team
step_bill_text: Invoice by milestone, recognize revenue, and review P&L automatically.
step_capture_text: Log the lead, client info, and project scope in the CRM.
step_deliver_text: Track time, manage milestones, and monitor burn rate in real time.
step_draft_text: AI drafts the 10 contract sections from the deal context. Versioned, with TODO slots where the human must decide.
step_estimate_text: AI suggests team composition and calculates cost, margin, and price.
step_forecast_text: Past months show real cash; future months project the pipeline. AI Forecast Summary names risks every month.
step_win_text: Close the deal — ANKA auto-creates the contract and project.
strongest_contributors_description: Projects currently contributing the most realized profit.
sum_of_all_deals: Sum of all deals in pipeline
tenant_information_desc: Read-only details about this tenant instance.
tenant_settings_subtitle: Manage your organization profile and plan details.
testing_range_help: Browsers, OS versions, device classes covered. Drives QA hours in Estimation.
testing_range_placeholder: e.g. Chrome / Firefox / Safari latest 2 versions; iOS 16+; Android 12+; viewport widths 360-1920px...
time_tracking_description: Track budget consumption and labor costs across active projects.
tip_save_version_first: Tip: save a version first if you want to compare the AI's new draft against the current scope side-by-side.
toast_contract_signed_won: Contract signed — deal moved to Won (S).
todos_remain_warning: {count} unresolved TODO markers remain. Sending with TODOs visible looks unprofessional — go back and resolve them.
top_pipeline_description: Probability-weighted open pipeline versus full target value.
trusted_by_agencies: Trusted by agencies managing projects for
unable_to_load_ai_usage: Unable to load AI usage data.
upload_file_pastes_hint: Pastes the file contents into the Requirement Description field above.
use_ai_or_add: Use AI Auto-Assign or add manually.
used_hours_help: Clock time you actually spent today.
win_prob_range_invalid: Win probability must be between 0 and 100.
won_revenue_summary: Won revenue · 1 active project · 5 team members
working_hours_help: Important for offshore deals — capture timezone explicitly to avoid disputes.
working_hours_placeholder: e.g. 9 AM – 6 PM MMT (UTC+6:30), Mon–Fri. After-hours emergencies via on-call rotation.
